old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.44.7.1.2","title":"Broadcast multicast RPL control at L2","description":"Use broadcast/elided L2 destination for any IPv6 multicast RPL destination while retaining IID-to-EUI mapping for unicast.","acceptance_criteria":"Parsed-wire DIO and DIS tests show multicast uses broadcast/elided addressing, unicast remains addressed, and receive behavior succeeds.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-07-20T06:06:49.534454323Z","created_by":"ec2-user","updated_at":"2026-07-20T06:06:49.534454323Z","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.44.7.1.2","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.44.7.1","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-20T06:06:49.621418128Z","created_by":"ec2-user","metadata":"{}"}]}

new_value: Centralized IPv6-to-L2 destination selection: multicast uses broadcast/no-destination and unicast derives EUI-64; receive filter accepts multicast. Added parsed DIO/DIS/unicast wire assertions and multicast DIO/DIS receive-response test.
